case_title: S F SOFTWARE CENTER CORPORATION VS BANK OF AMERICA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF S F SOFTWARE CENTER CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA CORPORATION $1,438.92 PRINCIPAL, $28.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,466.92 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA CORPORATION HEARING SET FOR APR-18-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,438.92 FILED BY S F SOFTWARE CENTER CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-06-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA CORPORATION
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF APR-18-1991, GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF S F SOFTWARE CENTER CORPORATION IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA CORPORATION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
